title: Game Programming Patterns
description: Understand Game Loop, Update Method, Double Buffer, and Object Pool patterns for performance.
learningObjectives: Design structure of a decoupled core Game Loop
Apply the Double Buffer pattern to render graphics without tearing
Implement an Object Pool to reuse bullet instances and prevent memory fragmentation

sections.title: Performance Patterns for Games
sections.content: Games have execution constraints. The Game Loop drives inputs, physics updates, and rendering. The Double Buffer pattern prevents rendering half-drawn frames by writing to a back buffer while showing the front buffer. Object Pools instantiate a batch of objects (like projectile bullets) in a flat array on startup and disable/enable them dynamically, avoiding high-latency runtime heap allocations.

sections.title: Object Pool Implementation
